ideation: This animation sequence will mimic the action of carefully nesting dolls.  The movement should be deliberate and precise, reflecting the delicate nature of the task.  We'll use both arms, with one arm holding the dolls and the other assisting in the nesting process.  The animation will emphasize the controlled lowering and positioning of the dolls. The arms will move in a synchronized manner, with the wrists playing a subtle role in fine-tuning the placement of the dolls.  The overall effect should be graceful and precise, evoking the feeling of handling something precious. Frame 1 will show both arms extended, ready to place the dolls. Frame 2 will depict one arm holding the dolls at a slightly lowered position. Frame 3 will show the nesting in progress. Frame 4 will show the nested dolls being held by one arm. Frame 5 will have both arms returning to the initial position.

frames.beat: arms extend, ready to place the dolls
left arm lowers the dolls gently
nesting the dolls with careful precision
arms return to rest, task complete
